2026-0519
2026-05-28FINBudget 2025 Implementation ActOrder Fixing the 16th Day After the Day on Which this Order Is Made as the Day on Which Division 22 of Part 5 of the Budget 2025 Implementation Act, No. 1 Comes into Force - CDEVOrder fixing the sixteenth day after the day on which this Order is made as the day on which Division 22 of Part 5 of the Budget 2025 Implementation Act No. 1, comes into Force in order to bring into force the Canada Development Investment Corporation Act.N/A
subject: Order Fixing the 16th Day After the Day on Which this Order Is Made as the Day on Which Division 22 of Part 5 of the Budget 2025 Implementation Act, No. 1 Comes into Force - CDEV
precis: Order fixing the sixteenth day after the day on which this Order is made as the day on which Division 22 of Part 5 of the Budget 2025 Implementation Act No. 1, comes into Force in order to bring into force the Canada Development Investment Corporation Act.
